allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); cd "D:\\claude ai_20260610\\backend"; $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = \(\(Get-Content .env -Raw\) -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" }\) -replace "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=","" -replace "`r",""; .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from main import app; print\('OK'\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $url = "https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/download/v2.71.0/gh_2.71.0_windows_amd64.msi"; $dest = "$env:TEMP\\gh_setup.msi"; Write-Host "下載 GitHub CLI..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "下載完成，開始安裝..."; Start-Process msiexec.exe -ArgumentList "/i `"$dest`" /quiet /norestart" -Wait; Write-Host "安裝完成")

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $url = "https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/download/v2.71.0/gh_2.71.0_windows_amd64.zip"; $dest = "$env:TEMP\\gh_cli.zip"; $extract = "C:\\Users\\chiaweiwang\\AppData\\Local\\gh-cli"; Write-Host "下載 ZIP..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "解壓縮..."; Expand-Archive -Path $dest -DestinationPath $extract -Force; $ghExe = Get-ChildItem $extract -Recurse -Filter "gh.exe" | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Host "gh.exe 位置：$\($ghExe.FullName\)"; & $ghExe.FullName --version)
